name: Quick and Easy Cherry Bread
recipeIngredient: 21 oz Tart Cherry Pie Filling (8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the frozen bread loaf rise once. Knead, reshape and place in a greased loaf pan.
2. Let rise again.
3. Make 2 slits in the top of the loaf to a depth equal to 1/3rd of the loaf.
4. Divide and place the cherry pie filling in the slits.
5. Let rise again to full size.
6. Brush the top of the loaf with melted butter and sprinkle with cinnamon sugar.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes.
8. Remove the loaf from the pan and cool. This bread can be served either warm or cold.
